sessionName: Long Z1 ~40 min (Vomero, flat) AM + Hyp B PM — Achilles-modified
intro: Achilles AM soreness today — moderate, dull, bilateral, present with both shoes (Adj #33/#34). Not sharp, not worsening = load-intolerant, not injured. Path is load management, not rest: strip today's Achilles spikes, keep the isometric, reassess Sun AM (24-hour rule).

Long run trimmed 55 → ~40 min, flat Z1, no strides/surge — and in the Vomero, not the Zoom Fly 6 (higher drop = less Achilles strain; Adj #34). Hyp B keeps the seated calf light/no-failure and holds the soleus progression; everything non-Achilles bumps as planned.
Reassess Sun AM: no worse than today → dose was right; worse → step down (cross-train Z1, drop calf work). Accutane raises tendon risk (§11.E) — escalate on sharp pain / swelling / sudden weakness.

table.cue: ACHILLES: hold 325, NO last-set-to-failure, controlled eccentric (Adj #34); 335 bump held until AM-clean
ACHILLES: keep 60s, HOLD progression — no deeper knee / no added load (Adj #34); isometric is tendon-friendly
Optional accessory; drop first if time-capped

lift.warmup: General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts, scap push-ups. Wrist-extensor isometric 3×30s/arm pre-lift (§10.A).
lift.cooldown: SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1

flags: ACHILLES (Adj #34): long run trimmed 55 → ~40 min, flat, Z1 only, NO strides / surge / hills. Energy-storage loads spike the tendon most — keep it boring.
SHOE: Vomero Plus, NOT the Zoom Fly 6 (Adj #34). Higher stack + 8mm drop vs the Zoom Fly's 6mm = less Achilles dorsiflexion strain. Reserve the carbon/low-drop shoe for short tempo while reactive.
Anchor Z1 by pace/RPE, not HR (Adj #9 — off-191 zones skew low for running). HR will read above the ≤155 cap; that's the rower-test artifact.
Reassess Sun AM (24-h rule): no worse → dose was right; worse → cross-train Z1 / drop calf work, and per §11.E flag sharp pain / swelling / sudden weakness (Accutane tendon risk).
cardio.workout: ~40 min easy continuous, flat, Vomero Plus (trimmed from 55 min, Adj #34). No strides.

targets.hr: by pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9); off-191 ≤155 cap is artifact

cardio.warmup: 3–5 min walk into easy Z1; built-in, no separate WU.
cardio.cooldown: 5 min easy walk; SI prehab if not done after the lift. Gentle, no aggressive calf stretching on a reactive tendon.
cues: Keep it flat and easy — this is a recovery-dose long run today, not a pace day
Stop the run if soreness turns sharp or worsens mid-run (Achilles, not normal easy-run dullness)
Report AM / during / post Achilles + SI status post-session — the Sun AM read drives the next call

currentLoads.note: 145×5 RIR 0 by mistake, then 140×5/5 RIR 2/1; 140 done at prescribed reps (last set RIR 1, above RPE 7). +5 → 145 next Wed (§5), expect RPE 8-9 — near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8
